When Jupiter is ahead of Venus, the latter will destroy all
white objects, the abodes of Brahmins, cattle and Gods, as well
as the Eastern region. Clouds will pour down' .plenty of hail-
stones (instead of rain); and people will be afiflicted .with throat-
diseases, but the autumnal crops will flourish.
[This verse is specially noteworthy for its charming allitera-
tion in both the halves,]
ihm*TT: ^ qhnff q^rf^ n n
When Mercury, whether setting or rising, is in advance of
Venus, the latter will produce copious rains and summer crops.
He will also engender diseases caused by the vitiation of bile, and
jaundice. In addition, he will destroy recluses, sacrificers, phy-
sicians, horses, actors, wrestlers etc., traders, cattle, vehicles, kings,
all yellow objects and the western country,
